## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CloudCog;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CloudCog { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
computing, ai, cluster, network

## Categories
development
